claim_boundary: This is bounded local feasibility evidence for quarantined authenticated-ingress prototypes and two non-Rust verification implementations. It does not ship an ingress profile, change the NCP wire, authenticate a live production peer, grant identity or authority, satisfy plant admission, prove interoperability, constitute independent human review, release or certify NCP 1.0, or satisfy any external release gate.

exact_cut_focused_validation.command: run the Zenoh metadata probe, TLS-terminating ingress runner, and complete signed-forwarding runner sequentially with fail-fast and pipefail

python_reference.durable_replay: SQLite 3.53.2 WAL, synchronous FULL, BEGIN IMMEDIATE, commit before handoff

node_verifier.cryptography: Node/OpenSSL 3.6.2 Ed25519 with explicit canonical point, small-order, and scalar prechecks
node_verifier.durable_replay: not implemented; replay diversity remains outside the result

independent_implementation_boundary.global_reject_rule: Any parser rejection, rejection-code disagreement, or accepted-projection disagreement makes the combined path reject.
independent_implementation_boundary.native_crypto_counterexample_retained: The pinned Node/OpenSSL runtime accepts an all-zero Ed25519 public key and signature for one retained message; the strict wrapper rejects it before the native call.

complete_local_preflight.final_line: NCP LOCAL PREFLIGHT PASSED — EXTERNAL RELEASE GATES REMAIN NOT RUN

current_rustsec_gate.reason_for_bounded_helper: cargo-deny 0.19.9 attempted an unbounded full-history clone when the current advisory database was absent and reported a misleading secondary FETCH_HEAD error after the primary clone failed.

retained_failed_attempts.reason: The first whole-repository run correctly failed because its live log had been placed inside the audited repository tree.
The next whole-repository run reached the dependency gate and failed when cargo-deny attempted the unbounded current RustSec history clone.

adopted_eighth_challenges: prove same-commit shallow and full advisory evaluation equality
isolate Git configuration, credentials, protocol, and proxy inputs
observe the official ref before and after the bounded clone
bound command output, time, database bytes, entry count, path length, and path depth
surface primary command errors rather than relying on cargo-deny's secondary metadata error
model_advice_boundary.disposition: Non-normative advice improved falsification coverage and the local gate mechanics but did not raise the evidence class.

resource_observations.classification: machine-local resource observations, not performance or capacity qualification

three_perspective_decision.protocol_and_security_correctness: LOCAL_PASS: exact actor, carrier, route, plane, class, digest, manifest, session, operation, and replay facts fail closed without transferring NCP or plant authority.
three_perspective_decision.consumer_and_runtime_usability: LOCAL_PASS_FOR_QUARANTINED_PROTOTYPES: two distinct non-Rust parser and crypto stacks agree locally; no consumer dependency, deployment topology, live A-over-B composition, or replay implementation diversity is claimed.
three_perspective_decision.operational_and_scientific_evidence: LOCAL_PASS: exact commits, tools, artifacts, failures, bounds, and non-claims are retained; performance, calibration, safety, interoperability, independent review, and release evidence remain absent.

residual_risks: Ingress trusted-computing-base isolation, co-tenancy, memory corruption containment, and authenticated manifest provenance remain unproved.
Live rotation, revocation, continuing authorization, trusted time, key custody, and live A-over-B congruence remain NOT RUN.

The Python replay store is cooperative same-host state; filesystem rollback, non-cooperating same-UID writers, shared filesystems, replicated ownership, multi-host replay, disk-full, kill-during-COMMIT, and WAL-aware recovery remain unproved.
The Node implementation proves parser and crypto implementation diversity but does not implement durable replay and is not an independent human review or installed peer.
Full-sized profile sweeps, combinatorial fuzzing, sanitizers, duration testing, soak, performance qualification, and external interoperability remain NOT RUN.
The tracked RUSTSEC-2026-0041 dependency advisory remains release-blocking and was neither waived nor hidden by this local pass.
